# Printwright

> The agent-buyable marketplace for licensed 3D-printable models. Search, inspect, and BUY
> print licenses over plain HTTP — payments use the x402 protocol (HTTP 402) settling on
> Hedera testnet in HBAR or USDC. No account, no API key, no card. Every purchase mints a
> tamper-evident license certificate on the Hedera Consensus Service, publicly verifiable
> via the mirror node.

API base: /api/v1 — full spec at /openapi.json

## How to buy (the whole flow)

1. GET /api/v1/models?q=beaver+hat — ranked search (fuzzy matching included)
2. GET /api/v1/models/{id}/download?license=personal → 402 with PaymentRequirements
   (amount in base units, asset 0.0.0=HBAR or 0.0.429274=USDC, payTo, extra.feePayer)
3. Sign a Hedera TransferTransaction (transactionId.accountId = feePayer, buyer signature
   only) and retry with the base64 PaymentPayload in the PAYMENT-SIGNATURE header
4. 200 → file download grants, license serial, certificate id, HashScan transaction link

Example 402 probe:
curl -i "https://<host>/api/v1/models/1/download?license=personal"

## Endpoints

- /api/v1/models: search (q, material, supports, max_price_cents)
- /api/v1/models/{id}: full metadata incl. license offers and terms
- /api/v1/models/{id}/download: the paid endpoint (x402)
- /api/v1/certificates/{cert_id}: public certificate + HCS mirror links
- /verify/{cert_id}: human-readable certificate verification page

## Reference clients

- scripts/buy.mjs in the repo — one-command purchase
- MCP server (mcp/server.mjs) — search_models, get_model, buy_license, verify_certificate
